allow: Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const j=JSON.parse\(s\);if\(j.access_token\){console.log\('OK got JWT, length',j.access_token.length,'| token user:',j.user&&j.user.email\)}else{console.log\('NO token. Response:',JSON.stringify\(j\).slice\(0,300\)\)}}catch\(e\){console.log\('parse err / raw:',s.slice\(0,300\)\)}}\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./app/package.json'\); console.log\('scripts:',JSON.stringify\(p.scripts,null,2\)\); console.log\('has jest dep:', !!\(p.devDependencies&&\(p.devDependencies.jest||p.devDependencies['jest-expo']\)\)||!!\(p.dependencies&&p.dependencies.jest\)\); console.log\('has @testing-library/react-native:', !!\(p.devDependencies&&p.devDependencies['@testing-library/react-native']\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('@testing-library/react-native/package.json'\); console.log\('version',p.version,'| main',p.main,'| module',p.module\); console.log\('exports', JSON.stringify\(p.exports\)\)")
